title: Recreate TRI-GITA SERVICES Solar Website Frontend

requirements.summary: Recreate the main App component with all sections in the correct order wrapped in LanguageProvider
acceptanceCriteria: All sections render in the correct order on the page
LanguageProvider wraps the full component tree
FloatingWhatsAppButton appears fixed at bottom-right

file_operations.description: Verify that App.tsx renders all required sections (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, Services, WhyChooseUs, BankFinanceBanner, WarrantyGuarantee, InquiryForm, WhatsAppSection, Footer) in the specified order, wraps everything in LanguageProvider, and includes FloatingWhatsAppButton as a fixed overlay component.

requirements.summary: Recreate the Header component with scroll-aware background, navigation, language switcher, and WhatsApp CTA
acceptanceCriteria: Header background changes on scroll
Language switcher toggles between EN, HI, and OD
Mobile nav menu is functional
WhatsApp CTA button is present and links correctly

file_operations.description: Ensure the Header component implements scroll-aware background transition (using scroll event listener or IntersectionObserver), includes desktop and mobile navigation links with smooth scroll anchors, a language switcher dropdown supporting EN/HI/OD using LanguageContext, and a WhatsApp CTA button with the correct business number link. Verify mobile hamburger menu toggle functionality.

requirements.summary: Recreate the Hero section with background image, gradient overlay, translated content, CTAs, and trust stats
acceptanceCriteria: Hero takes full viewport height
Background image is displayed with a navy gradient overlay
Headline, tagline, and stat tiles use translated strings
Both CTA buttons are present and functional

file_operations.description: Ensure Hero renders with full viewport height (min-h-screen), displays the background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg with a deep navy gradient overlay, shows translated headline and tagline from useTranslation hook, includes WhatsApp CTA and scheme CTA buttons with proper links, and renders three trust-indicator stat tiles with icons and translated text.

requirements.summary: Recreate the SchemeInfo section explaining PM Surya Ghar scheme with benefits, eligibility, and process steps
acceptanceCriteria: Benefits, eligibility, and four-step process are all displayed
Content renders correctly in all three languages

file_operations.description: Verify SchemeInfo displays PM Surya Ghar government scheme information including a benefits list, eligibility criteria section, and a four-step process visualization (application, survey, installation, subsidy credit). All text must use i18n translations via useTranslation hook for EN/HI/OD language support.

requirements.summary: Recreate the OdishaGuide section with subsidy tier cards and fade-in animations
acceptanceCriteria: Three subsidy tier cards are displayed
Cards animate in on scroll via IntersectionObserver
Rollout phase info is visible

file_operations.description: Ensure OdishaGuide renders three subsidy tier cards for 1kW, 2kW, and 3kW+ systems with corresponding subsidy amounts, implements IntersectionObserver-driven fade-in animations on scroll, and displays rollout phase coverage information. All content should use translated strings.

requirements.summary: Recreate the Services section with residential and commercial solar service cards
acceptanceCriteria: Two service cards are displayed
Each card has a feature list and a CTA linking to #inquiry or the form section

file_operations.description: Verify Services section displays two image cards for residential and commercial solar offerings. Each card should include a background image (use generated assets frontend/public/assets/generated/domestic-solar.dim_400x300.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/commercial-solar.dim_400x300.png), a feature checklist with translated items, and a CTA button that links to the inquiry form section (#inquiry or smooth scroll to InquiryForm).

requirements.summary: Recreate the WhyChooseUs section with three feature cards using themed accent colors
acceptanceCriteria: Three cards render with correct accent colors
Icons and translated text are displayed

file_operations.description: Ensure WhyChooseUs renders three feature cards with navy, gold, and teal accent themes respectively. Each card should display an icon (using Lucide React icons or similar), a translated title, and a translated description. Use Tailwind utility classes for the accent color theming (navy-600, gold-500, teal-500 or custom OKLCH palette colors).

requirements.summary: Recreate the BankFinanceBanner with shimmer effects, stat cards, and WhatsApp CTA
acceptanceCriteria: Banner has a dark navy background with shimmer animation
Gold stat cards are visible
WhatsApp CTA button is present

file_operations.description: Verify BankFinanceBanner renders as an animated dark navy banner (bg-navy-900 or similar) with shimmer effects (using CSS keyframe animation defined in index.css), displays gold-themed stat cards highlighting bank financing statistics with translated content, and includes a WhatsApp CTA button linking to the business WhatsApp number.

requirements.summary: Recreate the WarrantyGuarantee section with three styled warranty cards
acceptanceCriteria: Three warranty cards are displayed with correct year values
Accent colors match navy, gold, teal respectively
Content is translated

file_operations.description: Ensure WarrantyGuarantee displays three warranty cards showing 25-year, 10-year, and 5-year guarantee durations. Apply navy, gold, and teal accent theme colors to the respective cards. All titles, descriptions, and year values should use translated strings from the i18n translations.

requirements.summary: Recreate the InquiryForm with validation, WhatsApp link generation, and backend submission
acceptanceCriteria: All six fields are present with validation
Successful submission opens a WhatsApp deep link with form data
submitLead backend mutation is called on valid submission

file_operations.description: Verify InquiryForm includes fields for name, phone, email, city, system size (dropdown or select), and message with proper validation (required fields, email format, phone format). On valid submission, the form should: (1) call the useSubmitLead mutation hook from frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to submit data to the backend, and (2) open a pre-filled WhatsApp deep link (wa.me format) with the form data. Include loading state during submission and success/error feedback messages using translated strings.

requirements.summary: Recreate the WhatsAppSection with branded card and direct contact button
acceptanceCriteria: Section renders with translated text
WhatsApp button links to the correct number

file_operations.description: Ensure WhatsAppSection displays a branded card with a translated title and description, and includes a direct WhatsApp contact button linking to the business WhatsApp number using the wa.me URL format. Use green/WhatsApp brand colors for the button styling.

requirements.summary: Recreate the Footer with two-column layout, contact details, and navy-gold theme
acceptanceCriteria: Footer has two-column layout
Phone, email, address, and service area are displayed
WhatsApp link is present
Background is deep navy with gold accent elements

file_operations.description: Verify Footer implements a two-column layout with brand identity (company name, tagline, logo if applicable) on the left and contact details (phone, email, address, service area) on the right. Include a WhatsApp link in the contact section. Apply a navy-900 background with gold accent colors for text highlights and decorative elements. All text should use translated strings.

requirements.summary: Recreate the LanguageContext with localStorage persistence and useTranslation hook
acceptanceCriteria: Active language persists across page reloads via localStorage
useTranslation returns correct strings for all three languages

file_operations.description: Ensure LanguageContext provides language state management for 'en', 'hi', and 'od' options with localStorage persistence (key: 'language' or similar). The context should expose the current language and a setter function. Verify that the language preference is read from localStorage on mount and saved on change.

Verify useTranslation hook reads the active language from LanguageContext and returns the corresponding translation object from the translations map. Ensure type safety for the returned translation keys.

requirements.summary: Recreate the full i18n translations file with all UI section strings in EN, HI, and OD
acceptanceCriteria: All UI sections have translation keys for en, hi, and od
No missing translation keys when switching languages

file_operations.description: Ensure translations.ts exports a complete translations object with 'en', 'hi', and 'od' keys, each containing nested translation objects for all UI sections: hero (headline, tagline, stats), header (nav items, language labels), schemeInfo (title, benefits, eligibility, process steps), odishaGuide (subsidy tiers, rollout info), services (titles, features), whyChooseUs (feature titles and descriptions), bankFinanceBanner (stats, CTA), warrantyGuarantee (warranty durations and descriptions), inquiryForm (field labels, placeholders, button text, validation messages), whatsAppSection (title, description, button), and footer (brand text, contact labels). Verify no missing keys across all three languages.

requirements.summary: Recreate the global CSS with Google Fonts, Tailwind directives, theme variables, and animations
acceptanceCriteria: Outfit and Playfair Display fonts load correctly
Custom navy, gold, and teal color tokens are available
Shimmer keyframe animation is defined

file_operations.description: Verify index.css imports Google Fonts (Outfit and Playfair Display via @import or <link> in HTML), includes Tailwind directives (@tailwind base, components, utilities), defines CSS custom properties for the deep navy/emerald gold theme using :root and [data-theme] selectors, declares custom color palettes for navy (navy-50 through navy-950), gold (gold-50 through gold-600), and teal (teal-50 through teal-600) using OKLCH color space, and includes @keyframes definitions for banner shimmer effects and any other animations used in the design.

requirements.summary: Recreate the Tailwind configuration with custom fonts, OKLCH color palettes, and animations
acceptanceCriteria: Custom font families are available as Tailwind utilities
Navy, gold, and teal palette shades are available as Tailwind color utilities

file_operations.description: Ensure tailwind.config.js extends the default theme with custom fontFamily entries for 'outfit' (Outfit) and 'playfair' (Playfair Display), adds OKLCH-based color palette definitions for navy (50-950 shades), gold (50-600 shades), and teal (50-600 shades) in the colors object, defines custom borderRadius values if needed, adds custom boxShadow definitions for the design system, and includes keyframes and animation definitions for accordion animations and any other custom animations used in components.

requirements.summary: Recreate the useSubmitLead mutation hook for form submission with cache invalidation
acceptanceCriteria: Hook calls actor.submitLead with the lead data
On success, the 'leads' query cache is invalidated

file_operations.description: Verify useSubmitLead is implemented as a React Query useMutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitLead method with parameters (name, phone, email, city, systemSize, message). On successful mutation, the hook should invalidate the 'leads' query key using queryClient.invalidateQueries to refresh any cached lead data. Include proper error handling and loading state management.
